# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-06-22

Martin Fowler's site published a practitioner case study from a Bayer engineering team on techniques for building reliable agentic AI systems.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. Building reliable agentic AI systems
   Directly relevant to reliability of multi-agent/agentic systems, core to current and likely future work.

2. Temporary Cloudflare accounts for AI agents
   Direct infrastructure capability change for AI agents from a platform already in use (Cloudflare Pages); worth a read if agent workflows need scoped...

3. When I reject AI code even if it works
   Directly relevant practice for someone running heavy AI/multi-agent coding workflows — code review discipline for AI output.

4. Loupe – A iOS app that raises awareness about what native apps can see
   Open-source privacy-auditing tool for iOS; useful reference if evaluating app permission behavior, narrow audience.

5. I launched my first SaaS 7 days ago - 77 visitors, 13 signups, and a big lesson about distribution
   Concrete, sourced numbers on early-stage distribution via founder communities — useful benchmark data point for a solo launch.

Full brief with all 40 researched links → https://thenightlylibrarian.com/briefs/2026-06-22
